nasb.text: Then Joab returned from following Abner; when he had gathered all the people together, nineteen of David’s servants besides Asahel were missing.

esv.text: Joab returned from the pursuit of Abner. And when he had gathered all the people together, there were missing from David’s servants nineteen men besides Asahel.

cnv.text: 約押追趕押尼珥回來，集合所有人的時候，發現在大衛的臣僕中，除了亞撒黑以外，還少了十九個人。

ccb.text: 约押追赶押尼珥回来后细点人数，发现除亚撒黑外还损失了十九个人。
